mapper.select: SELECT component_id, component_code, component_name, component_description, component_type, component_purpose, CAST(constraints AS CHAR) AS constraints, CAST(properties AS CHAR) AS properties, CAST(inputs AS CHAR) AS inputs, CAST(outputs AS CHAR) AS outputs, create_time, update_time FROM component WHERE component_id IN ( SELECT component_id FROM domain_component WHERE domain_id = #{domainId} AND component_type = 'component' )
